message:
feat(storage): implement full git archive storage layer

Complete rewrite of mcp-agent-mail-storage from stub to full implementation:
- Archive root + per-project git repo initialization with .gitattributes
- Agent profile writes (agents/<Name>/profile.json)
- File reservation artifact writes (sha1-digest + id-based JSON files)
- Message write pipeline: canonical, outbox, inbox copies + thread digest
- Notification signals for cross-agent coordination
- Git commit operations with Agent:/Thread: trailers
- Path traversal prevention for archive-relative paths
- 9 unit tests covering all major operations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -17,3 +17,6 @@ sha2 = "0.10"
 hex = "0.4"
 thiserror.workspace = true
 mcp-agent-mail-core = { path = "../mcp-agent-mail-core" }
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+tempfile = "3"
